initiatives.name: Fresno Brown Berets
initiatives.description: A Chicanx grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through direct action and cultural organizing. They coordinate community support initiatives, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through cultural preservation, youth leadership, and creating spaces for movement building and collective resistance.

initiatives.name: Fresno Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: We recover food that would otherwise be discarded and prepare vegetarian meals that are served free of charge.
